steps.title: Enquire
steps.desc: Fill in the form below or call us. We'll schedule a call to discuss the opportunity in your city.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.desc: We walk you through the model, margins, requirements, and answer all your questions honestly.

steps.title: Agreement
steps.desc: Sign the franchise agreement, complete training, and receive your equipment and branding pack.

steps.title: Launch!
steps.desc: Start trading at events in your area with full The Cane House support behind you from day one.
